entities.description: As a subsection of '引脚定义', this section provides the pin definition for the CONOA connector, which is part of the hardware specification for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to a specific hardware connector (CONOA) detailed in section 2.2.1, which is part of the pin definition for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.

relations.description: The hardware connector 'CONOA' is the primary subject of section 2.2.1.
